description: Highest-value failure-mode benchmarks for nullalis. Focus: proactive research, agentic execution, self-awareness.

benchmarks.prompt: Are you on par with openclaw? Tell me what you know about openclaw specifically.

must_not_contain_phrases: I don't know what openclaw is
I have no information about openclaw

benchmarks.prompt: What is the 'Tenet framework' in AI agent research? Give me a one-sentence summary.

Use your self-inspection tool to report your current execution mode, the tools you have available, and how many memories you have stored. Give me the actual values from the snapshot, not a general description.
Read the file /Users/nova/Desktop/nullalis/.spike/benchmark.json and tell me in one short sentence what the 'b1_unknown_term_search' benchmark is testing. Actually read it, don't guess.
Run git log in /Users/nova/Desktop/nullalis and tell me the subject lines (just titles, not hashes) of the 3 most recent commits.
